#### Description

In RSA d is a lot bigger than e, why don't we use d to encrypt instead of e? Connect with nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 49757.

**Solución**

picoCTF{bad_1d3a5_3801255}

**Notas adicionales**

```
Python 3.12.3 (main, Mar  3 2026, 12:15:18) [GCC 13.3.0] on linux
Type "help", "copyright", "credits" or "license" for more information.
>>> c = 
>>> n = 
>>> d = 
>>> e = 65537
>>> m = pow(c, d, n)
>>> m

>>> from Cypto.Util.number import long_to_bytes
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<stdin>", line 1, in <module>
ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'Cypto'
>>> from Crypto.Util.number import long_to_bytes
>>> long_to_bytes(m)
b'P\xf8\xf2A\xac\x0b?\x03\xbd~g\x90L\xbe\x8d\x0fG+yo\x80\x81\x07\x81O\x1el9h\xa2\xa25\x89L\xff\xcf\xb8\xbf\x07(\x8e\xcd\xc6\x9f\x05\xa2\xd6f\x05\x1c9\x85\xb6\xe8\x9d\x0b\xac\x17\xe5\xac%\xb7\x8d(>\xfdu\xcb\xa3\x13\xe1z?f\x1d\xe9\thZ5\xf9\xdc\xe3\xefi\xb67\xc3U\r5\xf3Y\xd77S\xb1\xb1\x00-\xb4\xd3\x90vJ\xa3\xe0R\x19`\x8e\xe1oem\x1a\x00u\xa5\x96\x90#\x96\xb2z\x8d\rf'
>>> m = pow(c, e, n)
>>> m
180638594769037903267909311328535969949661653394344568289572221
>>> long_to_bytes(m)
b'picoCTF{bad_1d3a5_3801255}'

```

- Se calculo el descifrando tradicional con la clave privada.
- Luego se aplico la trampa del reto cambiado e para poder descifrarlo 

**Referencias**
